title: 神戸新聞杯の後に・取り戻したもの

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think I ran pretty well today.
choice_data_list: How was the scenery from the lead?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, very pretty!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think I'm going to be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that running in the Kobe Shimbun Hai
has helped Suzuka to feel sure of the answer she
found at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In consideration of this step forward, I think we
should start putting together her new agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've had my eye on the Kikuka Sho for a while
now. But just as I'm about to bring it up—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, I actually have a request.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The whole time I was racing today, I was thinking
to myself—"this is who I am."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That thought is what pushed me past the others
and into the lead. And the scenery there was...
astounding.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Looking at it, I started to wonder.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If I run against even faster opponents and still
manage to take the lead, how amazing will that
view be?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka looks at me with a look of quiet
determination.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to run in the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be able to see sights there I never
imagined!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is the pinnacle of the G1
medium-distance races. All of the best
racers—including senior racers—will be present.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to respect her wishes. In fact, with her
prowess in medium-distance races, winning the
autumn Tenno Sho isn't beyond the realm of
possibility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But still, she needs more experience.
choice_data_list:
All right then, let's make that our main
objective for next year!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to take on the autumn Tenno Sho,
then the long distance Kikuka Sho won't help us
prepare. We'll need a more suitable agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We should be running in as many medium G2
races—the same length as the autumn Tenno
Sho—as we can. So instead of the Kikuka Sho...
choice_data_list:
Why don't we start by giving the Kinko Sho a
shot?

Why don't we start by giving the Kinko Sho a
shot?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The Kinko Sho... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So, we set our sights on the autumn Tenno Sho,
using the upcoming Kinko Sho as a stepping
stone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I have to make much more progress for the
autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her so hopeful for what lies ahead, I can't
help but think about how much she's grown.
